_comment: #505 modifier-key shortcuts: select the Spearmen (seed 12345, ~407,300; spawn formation is Tight), zoomed in close enough to see rank spacing. Press T to cycle Tight -> Loose (visibly wider spacing), then Shift+T to cycle the other way, back to Tight -- the mark spacing at tick 105 should match tick 10 (before T), demonstrating the shift-reverses-the-cycle parallelism the issue asks for.
